summary: Dow fell 280 pts (-0.57%) to 48,861. S&P 500 -0.04% to 7,135.95, Nasdaq +0.04% to 24,673. Fed held rates steady. Magnificent Seven earnings in focus (GOOGL, MSFT, AMZN, META). Oil rising on Iran blockade news. NXP Semi +19%, Seagate +17% on earnings beats.
